narrative:
Bremen Village (precinct in Fairfield County) has 914 registered voters, with 60.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 27.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 12.3%, a pronounced Republican lean of 15.2 percentage points.
